mapper.select: select c.comment_id, c.content, c.depth, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.parent_id, c.post_id, c.member_id, case when pl.member_id = c.member_id then concat(pl.name, '사장') else m.nickname end as member_name, case when pl.member_id = c.member_id then 1 else 0 end as owner_comment from comment c join member m on c.member_id = m.member_id join post p on c.post_id = p.post_id left join place pl on p.place_id = pl.place_id where c.post_id = #{postId} order by case when c.parent_id is null and pl.member_id = c.member_id and p.category = '방문자인증후기' then 0 else 1 end, coalesce(c.parent_id, c.comment_id) asc, c.parent_id is not null, c.comment_id asc

select c.comment_id, c.content, c.depth, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.parent_id, c.post_id, c.member_id, m.nickname as member_name from comment c join member m on c.member_id = m.member_id where c.comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.insert: insert into comment (content, depth, parent_id, post_id, member_id) values (#{content}, #{depth}, #{parentId}, #{postId}, #{memberId})
